title: Software Update - DFU - Headset and Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings - Update All
scenario: DFU "Update All" button shows low battery popup and blocks firmware update when headset or charge case battery is below 5%
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure the headset or charge case battery is below 5%.
3. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
6. Verify that a popup appears with the message: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'.
7. Connect both the headset and charge case to chargers (power source).
8. Navigate back to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
10. Verify that the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process proceeds.
expected: When headset or charge case battery is below 5%, tapping 'Update All' shows a popup: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'. DFU only proceeds when both headset and charge case are plugged into chargers.
